page: Microsoft Azure HC44-32rs is an HCS family server instance running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 32 dedicated physical cores and 32 vCPUs powered by an Intel Xeon 8168 processor operating at 2.7 GHz. The x86_64 architecture includes 32 KB L1d cache, 1.0 MB L2 cache, and 33 MB L3 cache per core. The system is equipped with 352.0 GB of system memory, providing 11.0 GB of RAM per core. It includes 717 GB of local storage, supports Premium Storage, and is RDMA capable.

Benchmark results show strong performance in memory bandwidth for large uncached blocks, reaching 208.35 GB/sec, and multi-threaded bzip3 decompression at 246.72 GB/sec. Average performance is observed in stress-ng single-core (1413.98) and multi-core (45149.72) tests, as well as Geekbench multi-core workloads (12559.0). However, single-threaded gzip compression is weak at 23.69 GB/sec, and LLM text generation speeds are poor, yielding 24.95 tokens/sec for small models and 5.51 tokens/sec for medium models.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated core allocation and high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 11:1 provide a dense resource profile for memory-bound workloads without the overhead of hyperthreading. The inclusion of RDMA capability and local storage supports clustered configurations. This server is suited for database operations, memory-intensive scientific computing, multi-threaded decompression tasks, and general-purpose high-memory workloads.
description: Microsoft Azure HC44-32rs is an HCS family server instance configured with 32 dedicated physical cores and 32 vCPUs on an Intel Xeon 8168 processor running at 2.7 GHz. It features 352.0 GB of RAM, yielding 11.0 GB per core, alongside 717 GB of local storage with Premium Storage and RDMA capabilities. Operating on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, its x86_64 architecture supports AVX-512 instructions. Benchmarks indicate strong multi-threaded bzip3 decompression and large-block memory read bandwidth, though single-threaded gzip compression and LLM text generation speeds are weak to poor. This hardware profile is suited for memory-intensive workloads, database operations, and multi-threaded data processing tasks requiring dedicated CPU resources.
og_description: Microsoft Azure HC44-32rs is an HCS family server featuring 32 dedicated Intel Xeon 8168 cores, 352 GB RAM, and 717 GB local storage, optimized for memory-intensive and RDMA-clustered workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure HC44-32rs features 32 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 352 GB RAM, and RDMA capabilities for memory-intensive workloads.
tagline: A dedicated-core, memory-optimized server featuring high memory bandwidth and RDMA capabilities for demanding database and multi-threaded processing workloads.
bullet_points: 32 dedicated Intel Xeon 8168 physical cores running at 2.7 GHz
352.0 GB of system memory providing 11.0 GB per core
717 GB of local storage with Premium Storage and RDMA support
Strong multi-threaded decompression and large-block memory read bandwidth
Suited for database operations, clustered HPC, and memory-intensive workloads
